NAME: Overdue Orders
SQL_TEXT: SELECT * FROM ORDER_RELEASE WHERE PROMISE_DATE < SYSDATE AND STATUS != 'COMPLETED'

NAME: Carrier Performance Score
SQL_TEXT: SELECT CARRIER_GID, AVG(ON_TIME_PCT) FROM SHIPMENT GROUP BY CARRIER_GID

NAME: Capacity Utilization
SQL_TEXT: SELECT DOMAIN_GID, COUNT(*) FROM SHIPMENT WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY DOMAIN_GID

NAME: Fuel Cost Trend
SQL_TEXT: SELECT TRUNC(SHIP_DATE,'MONTH'), AVG(FUEL_CHARGE) FROM SHIPMENT GROUP BY TRUNC(SHIP_DATE,'MONTH')

NAME: Customer Delivery Performance
SQL_TEXT: SELECT CONSIGNEE_GID, AVG(ACTUAL_ETA - PROMISED_ETA) FROM SHIPMENT GROUP BY CONSIGNEE_GID

NAME: Equipment Downtime
SQL_TEXT: SELECT EQUIPMENT_GID, SUM(DOWNTIME_HOURS) FROM SHIPMENT_EVENT WHERE EVENT_TYPE = 'MAINTENANCE' GROUP BY EQUIPMENT_GID
